rows.label: tev000901_MSG0001
rows.name: Are you a BLADE?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000901_MSG0002
rows.name:
I am Boze Rose Lowes, of the Avalanche.
Some call me the Avalancher Hammer, for
my fists pound any deviation straight![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000901_MSG0003
rows.name:
When we're battling demons to protect
humanity, sometimes we all step off
the path of enlightenment.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000901_MSG0004
rows.name:
And that's when I come around to
beat the dharma into you! Ah ha ha![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000901_MSG1001
rows.name:
It's a day full of hope
in a world full of hope.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000901_MSG1002
rows.name:
What do you need? Shall I
grant you my strength?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000901_JNK0010
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev000901_SEL0011
rows.name: Add Boze Rose to your team.

rows.label: tev000901_JNK0020
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000901_SEL0021
rows.name: Decline Boze Rose's request for now.

rows.label: tev000901_MSG1003
rows.name:
Then let us get started. There
is much wisdom I have to beat
into that thick skull of yours.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000901_MSG1004
rows.name:
Very well. If you need me, I will
be here aligning my heart chakra.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000901_MSG1009
rows.name:
I've heard that the four of you are
going to recover an alien mech.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000901_MSG1010
rows.name:
No matter how much faith you hold that the indigens
will not react to your Blue Bloods, I urge you to
stay wary. You never know what might transpire.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000901_MSG1015
rows.name:
Rescuing brethren in peril is our first
duty as BLADEs, so we should depart for
Valley of Oblivion immediately.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000901_MSG1016
rows.name:
I will tear the Growth asunder with
my dharmic might, so you must allow
me to accompany you! Kaaaatsu![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000901_JNK0030
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev000901_SEL0031
rows.name: Add Boze Rose to your team.

rows.label: tev000901_JNK0040
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000901_SEL0041
rows.name: Decline Boze Rose's request for now.

rows.label: tev000901_MSG1017
rows.name:
We've no time to lose—I'll not sacrifice
a single BLADE to those demons![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000901_MSG1018
rows.name:
Very well. If you need me, I will
be here aligning my heart chakra.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000901_MSG1023
rows.name:
Your next mission is to search
for a section of the Lifepoint?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000901_MSG1024
rows.name:
I can help you in this, if you would have me. We have
little time left in these bodies, after all, so let us
hope that the next piece of the Lifepoint is the core.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000901_JNK0050
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev000901_SEL0051
rows.name: Add Boze Rose to your team.

rows.label: tev000901_JNK0060
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000901_SEL0061
rows.name: Decline Boze Rose's request for now.

rows.label: tev000901_MSG1025
rows.name:
Then let us be off! We shall be
the light that illuminates the
glorious true path of mankind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000901_MSG1026
rows.name:
Very well. If you need me, I will
be here aligning my heart chakra.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000901_MSG1031
rows.name:
I sense strange spirits in this
land they call White Woods.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000901_MSG1032
rows.name:
Shall I join you, that I might
pacify the spirits by meditating
on the Amitabha Buddha?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000901_JNK0070
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev000901_SEL0071
rows.name: Add Boze Rose to your team.

rows.label: tev000901_JNK0080
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000901_SEL0081
rows.name: Decline Boze Rose's request for now.

rows.label: tev000901_MSG1033
rows.name:
Then let us be off! We shall be
the light that illuminates the
glorious true path of mankind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000901_MSG1034
rows.name:
Very well. If you need me, I will
be here aligning my heart chakra.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000901_MSG1039
rows.name:
All men stray from the path of
enlightenment at times. It is
what they do next that matters.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000901_MSG1040
rows.name:
This is the lesson that I shall teach
to Lao, once I have imbued it upon my
fists. Will you allow me to give it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000901_JNK0090
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev000901_SEL0091
rows.name: Add Boze Rose to your team.

rows.label: tev000901_JNK0100
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000901_SEL0101
rows.name: Decline Boze Rose's request for now.

rows.label: tev000901_MSG1041
rows.name:
One way or the other, Lao, I shall
introduce the dharma to your mislaid soul.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000901_MSG1042
rows.name:
Very well. Then I entrust
this duty to you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000901_MSG1047
rows.name:
Form is emptiness. Emptiness is
form. This is the task entrusted
to we few remaining humans.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000901_MSG1048
rows.name:
It is a task I would very much
like to complete. I can depart
immediately, if you are willing?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000901_JNK0110
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev000901_SEL0111
rows.name: Add Boze Rose to your team.

rows.label: tev000901_JNK0120
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000901_SEL0121
rows.name: Decline Boze Rose's request for now.

rows.label: tev000901_MSG1049
rows.name:
Then come Naraka or high water,
we go to the Central Life![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000901_MSG1050
rows.name: Very well. I entrust this duty to you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000901_MSG1055
rows.name:
We may have recovered the
Central Life, but there remains
much that I must teach you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000901_MSG1056
rows.name:
If you intend to continue exploring
this world, then I should come
along as your spiritual guide.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000901_JNK0130
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev000901_SEL0131
rows.name: Add Boze Rose to your team.

rows.label: tev000901_JNK0140
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev000901_SEL0141
rows.name: Decline Boze Rose's request for now.

rows.label: tev000901_MSG1057
rows.name:
Then let us get started. There
is much wisdom I have to beat
into that thick skull of yours.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000901_MSG1058
rows.name:
Very well. If you need me, I will
be here aligning my heart chakra.[ST:wait ]
